slugCats.description: This is the easy mode of slugcats having a nearly identical campaign to the survivor with the exception that mobs kind of ignore you.
This is the regular difficulty of Rainworld, past this campaign it only gets more difficult.
This campaign is the hard mode of Rainworld as in order to beat the game on this mode have to go to nearly every region.
This is a dlc cat, that allows you to craft, combine food, crush enemies, and throw powerful blows
Like the gourmand, this cat can craft, however specifically you craft explosives to hunt those who've wronged you and you get a cool double jump
This cat can make spears from it's tail like a porcupine would and eats by hitting creatures with the spear, equipped to be the message bearer in a dangerous world
With the world being particularly rainy in this cat's campaign it moves much faster, jumps higher, and can breathe longer underwater, something crucial for giving a heart transplant
This cat is built for the cold, the world having frozen over in it's campaign, equipped with a tongue to get around and avoid violence as this cat is vegan
This cat ends up with weird powers bestowed by the ghost of a god and can choose to help three seperate entities.
